title: Elon Musk and Sam Altman are going to court over OpenAI’s future
description: After a yearslong legal feud, Elon Musk and OpenAI CEO Sam Altman are heading to trial this week in Northern California in a case that could have sweeping consequences. title: OpenAI ends Microsoft legal peril over its $50B Amazon deal
description: OpenAI has won major concessions from its largest shareholder, Microsoft, that will allow it to sell products on AWS, while Microsoft gets more cash in a revenue-share agreement.

title: OpenAI could be making a phone with AI agents replacing apps
description: There have been plenty of rumors about OpenAI's hardware plans, which involve launching a pair of earbuds. A new note from industry analyst Ming-Chi Kuo suggests that the AI company might be working on a phone in collaboration with MediaTek, Qualcomm, and Luxshare.

title: Compass Therapeutics unveils key secondary endpoint results from pivotal biliary tract cancer trial
description:
A year after it reported a Phase 2/3 success, Compass Therapeutics on Monday revealed further results for its closely watched bispecific antibody in second-line biliary tract cancer.

title: STAT+: Intellia says CRISPR-based treatment for rare disease reduced swelling attacks in pivotal trial
description: With good results from Intellia, the CRISPR field faces the question: How attractive will the one-and-done approach be to patients and doctors?

title: SpaceX XAI 2027
description: SpaceX dish production is ramping toward 50,000 dishes/day. It is already at ~25k/day recently. The high speed internet subscriber base could more than double to ~20–25 million by end of 2026 and then ~50 million in 2027. title: Accenture, Vodafone, and SAP to pilot humanoid robots in the warehouse
description:
The humanoids in the pilot are powered by Accenture’s Robot Brain solution, enabling them to interact naturally with human operators.

description: German AI startup Aleph Alpha is to be acquired by Canadian AI lab Cohere, creating a business that will position itself as a sovereign alternative to US AI labs. Cohere, founded in 2019 and valued at...

title: OpenAI GPT 5.5 Has Good Ranking Scores But Is It Better?
description: OpenAI GPT-5.5 tops the Artificial Analysis Intelligence Index by 3 points, breaking a three-way tie with Anthropic and Google. There is indication that is faster and has some good results but some results are mid. More time is needed. It is a good model but it does not appear to be groundbreaking.

Atmos Space Cargo raises $30 million for reentry missions
description:
Atmos Space Cargo has raised 25.7 million euros ($30.1 million) to fly a series of reentry vehicle missions and work on a larger spacecraft.

title: FCC clears AST SpaceMobile constellation as launch setback clouds ramp-up
description:
AST SpaceMobile received permission to provide direct-to-smartphone broadband services in the United States with up to 248 satellites, days after a botched launch complicated plans to ramp up deployments this year.

title: Rivian (RIVN) starts R2 production days after tornado hit factory, deliveries this spring
description:
